reviews.review_description:
It's very good, but it kicks me out of the game every 10 minutes, and when I'm playing, the game freezes and doesn't register my hits.

I actually bought it because I played the demo first and thought it was the best game in the world, but the full version disappointed me.

I need a refound

developer_response.body:
Hey, first of all -- I'm glad you liked the demo version. There's just been an update (v1.86T/v121) which should improve the stability, also -- slight changes have been made to the way the game registers hits in this update, please let me know if it's improving.

Thanks,
Marcel

reviews.review_description: The game is good but it keeps kicking me out when im playing for no reason

reviews.review_title: Need more genera’s of music. Pop hip hop
reviews.review_description: Needs way more options in genera’s. More pop hip hop r&b etc.

developer_response.body:
You ask - we deliver! With the latest update, the modding platform Mod.io has been integerated, so the song-library can be easily extended.
Currently there are over 100 songs and 13 different genred to choose from :-)

reviews.review_description: best

in my opinion i think the game has the potential to be a really good drumming game but needs more work put in to it and also more rock tracks such as metallica and/or nirvana and i feel like the sticks need to be a little longer but other than that this game is really good￼

reviews.review_title: Great fun but need more rock tracks
reviews.review_description:
Just bought this game and love it.
Just not keen on a lot of the songs as many seem to be heavy metal rather than rock. Could we have some classic 80’s rock song’s please? That would be awesome!
I’m playing this game 24/7 but it needs more song like Metallica and Nirvana!

For playing custom songs this is one of the best.  There's a lot of custom songs on Steam for the PC version.  I had to adjust the timing offset in the game options once you do that it feels great.  Some of the older reviews are not really up to date.  The game keeps getting updated and the Quest version is a lot better now.  Still could use some updates but already fun to play.

reviews.review_title: Game not ready ready for sale yet
reviews.review_description:
The bugs listed below existed since day 1 of d/ling this game, but I chose to give it some time since its a sidequest app. Now I just think its unfair to charge money for an app that's not even being maintained. I'd understand if these were rare/complicated bugs, but these are COMMON/GAME-BREAKING bugs that doesnt seem to be getting ANY attention at all

Bugs:
-The game does not save any scores and recommends the tutorial every single time I open the app as if I am a new player
-setting values are not updated dynamically(ex: drumstick tilt does not update until starting a song, then coming back to the menu)
-After playing around 3-5 songs, the game has to be restarted because none of the menu items are clickable. This happens every time without fail
-The song "Broken by Ghosts of August" is bugged. When youre playing correctly, it plays the lower volume track that should playing when you mess up, and plays the louder volume track when you actually mess up or stop playing(opposite of every other song)

I do play the drums IRL and honestly think this game actually does have a lot of potential and I am definitely looking forward to what this game becomes. I do understand the bugs fixes and other improvements arent being implemented because the developer(s) might be too busy or preoccupied to work on it, but they should definitely NOT be charging a dime for this game in its current state. As fun as it can be while the game works, you will be left more frustrated than satisfied after playing

*Note* There another issue with a song where some hits do not register, even when hit perfectly. I don't remember exactly which song it was at the moment, I just don't want to turn on my quest just to check the song title.

developer_response.body:
Hi LumberJack456,

I'm curious to hear what you think of the most recent update(s).

While the game is still a work-in-progess, in it's current state I'm sure it'll be a better experience than a few versions back.

Thanks in advance!

reviews.review_title: Do not buy, huge waste of money
reviews.review_description: This game is the worst drumming game I have ever played.i play the drums in real life and this game is a horrible game to play if learning how to play drums. You can't reposition the drums at all and the way they have the drums set up is pretty dumb as well. The hi hat and crash are literally right next to each other and its hard not to hit both of them at the same time while playing. And the drums are unrealistically big. If you could reposition the drums then i might give this game a better review but as of now, this game blows donkeys for pennies. Oh one more thing and i hope the developers read this, why would you put dubstep songs in a drumming game? I feel pretty insulted for playing those crappy songs. There are like 2 or 3 of those crap dubstep songs and a total of only 9 songs? And none are metal. How can you have a drumming game with no metal? You cant. This game sucks.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thank you for your honest review.
We value your feedback, even more since you're a drummer.
Apart from the things listed above, would you mind getting in touch to discuss further improvements to this game? If so, please contact us at feedback@drumbeatsvr.com
Best,

Marcel

reviews.review_description: Game needs more love like adjustable drums in stead of hole kit and more songs but custom songs are where it's at but does scratch that itch for a rytheme game

The free play mode sounds and plays great and got my hopes up, but when I actually tried to play a song in arcade mode, it all fell apart. Hitting drums often makes no sound at all, the game just lowers the song's volume anytime you miss a note. This creates a very fake and unsatisfying feeling. I don't want to just play pretend air drums to a fixed track. I hope the Devs change arcade mode to work like free play, so you hear every beat, even if it's the wrong drum or timed wrong, because free play shows this game has potential to be very good. But for me this game is unplayable in its current state and not at all enjoyable.
I find the game really good though I am not a drum player myself. However, it would be nice if you could resize the drumset and also, I cant seem to be able to add custom songs.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thanks for the review and feedback!
To add custom songs to the game, place the .mid and .wav/.flac/.mp3 files inside
Quest 2\Internal shared storage\Music\DrumBeatsVR\Customs (create the directory if it doesn't exist).

There are a lot of customs on the Steam forums of the game, or on the discord server (drumbeatsvr.com/discord).

Thanks again!

reviews.review_title: Best Drum Game on the store
reviews.review_description: Drumbeats VR on Steam is now on the Quest!?!?! Niiiice!! now i can drum on the go.

Can I ask what is the problem I downloaded  demo version of this fab game but then last night  I decided to buy the game its self but it Start the game up  what csn I do 

Other than that it's a fab game when I can get it going
This is my most favorite game by far. First learning to play the drums and now trying to perfect playing the drums. Can’t wait for songs. ROCK ON 🤘

since the latest update....i have a quest 2 and my custom songs dont show up in the game?? but they are in the correct folders stored on my headset.... Plz help would love to get back banging the sticks... by far the best drum rhythm game currently available...

developer_response.body:
Hi there!
Customs were indeed broken but with the latest update, customs need to be put in Music/DrumBeatsVR/Customs folder on your quest,

Thanks an enjoy!

reviews.review_title: One of the best rhythm games on Quest!
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love playing this game. I play it multiple times a day. Decent list of base songs and support for custom songs! Unique drumming mechanics that are different from other games. Very realistic drum sounds. All around one of my favorite Quest games. On top of that, the developer is such a fantastic guy. He will help with anything you need and takes feedback incredibly well and tries to implement fixes almost immediately. To anyone who likes rhythm games or drum games I highly recommend 10/10 would buy again 😃

reviews.review_title: Good when it wants to be
reviews.review_description: Constantly crashes mid way through a song but takes its time doing it, ruining Song scores even if you can save it from crash. Also has constant bug of environmental refusing to change. But when the game works its absolutely amazing and one of my favourite games on here

developer_response.body:
Hi there!
It took a while to figure out - but with the latest update, the crashes has been fixed!

reviews.review_description: I love this game!
